e.g. Use a formal tone; keep brand names: e.g. Use a formal tone; keep brand names in English

to view the prices in different currenci: to view the prices in different currencies.

section, click Change currency formattin: Section, click Change currency formatting, then replace the default code with the following:
to go to Shopify theme editor >> enable: to go to Shopify theme editor >> enable "Ciwi_Switcher" >> click the "Save" button in the right corner.

Welcome to our app! If you have any ques: Welcome to our app! If you have any questions, feel free to email us at support@ciwi.ai, and we will respond as soon as possible.
Some content of the store does not compl: Some store content violates OpenAI’s translation policy. Please contact us for manual support.
When using this feature, we only consume: When using your own API key, we only consume the quota of the connected service. No additional fees will be charged by us. To avoid unexpected charges, please set quota limits carefully based on your third-party API usage.
The API key is not valid: Invalid API key. Please check and try again.
count is too large or apikey is incorrec: Request count is too high, or the API key is invalid. Please check your settings.

Permanent quotas · Never expire · Top up: No expiration. Reusable anytime. Top up as needed.
Buy extra credits now to continue using: Buy extra credits now to continue using

The exchange rate must be a positive num: Exchange rate must be greater than 0
The exchange rate must be less than 2147: The exchange rate must be less than 2147483647

If you leave this page, any unsaved chan: If you leave this page, any unsaved changes will be lost.
Customers can switch languages and curre: Customers can switch languages and currencies when visiting the site.
The switcher is currently disabled. If y: The switcher is currently disabled. If you need IP-based automatic language and currency switching, please click “ Setup”.
Image pixel size cannot exceed 20 millio: Image pixel size cannot exceed 20 million pixels
Only JPEG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC and GIF forma: Only JPEG, PNG, WEBP, HEIC and GIF formats are supported
Strong CTA – Clear call to buy: Strong CTA – Clear call to buy
The Private API has been limited due to: The Private API has been limited due to your plan (Current plan: {{plan}})
Upgrade to get a higher credit limit (Cu: Upgrade to get a higher credit limit (Current plan: {{plan}})
1. Click to download the product import: 1. Click to download the product import template
2. Fill in the translated data in the te: 2. Fill in the translated data in the template
3. Contact us to import the correspondin: 3. Contact us to import the corresponding files
You can select up to 5 languages at once: You can select up to 5 languages at once.
Upgrade to a paid plan to unlock this fe: Upgrade to a paid plan to unlock this feature
You don’t have any glossary active right: You don’t have any glossary active right now
Choose the right plan for you: Choose the right plan for you
Get extra credits that never expire: Get extra credits that never expire
Everything you need to know about pricin: Everything you need to know about pricing and billing.
How does the 5-day free trial work?: How does the 5-day free trial work?
Choosing Pro or Unlimited gives you 5 da: Choosing Pro or Unlimited gives you 5 days of full access to all features, along with 200,000 trial credits. Cancel anytime before the trial ends to avoid billing.
Can I get a discount on my plan?: Can I get a discount on my plan?
Yes. You'll save 20% when you choose yea: Yes. You'll save 20% when you choose yearly billing. Discount applies automatically at checkout.
No. We do not offer refunds. You can can: No. We do not offer refunds. You can cancel anytime to stop future billing, and your plan will remain active until the end of the billing period.
What happens when I run out of credits?: What happens when I run out of credits?
You'll need to purchase extra credits to: You'll need to purchase extra credits to keep creating content. You won't lose access to features, only to credit-based actions.
Plan credits reset at the end of each bi: Plan credits reset at the end of each billing cycle. But if you cancel or downgrade, any unused credits stay active for 3 more months.
Do extra credits affect my plan or featu: Do extra credits affect my plan or features?
No. Plan credits come with your subscrip: No. Plan credits come with your subscription and reset monthly. Extra credits are only used when plan credits run out, and they never expire. They don't unlock new features or raise limits.
What happens if I upgrade my plan?: What happens if I upgrade my plan?
You get your new plan's credits and feat: You get your new plan's credits and features right away. Any remaining credits from your previous plan won't carry over.
Will I lose credits if I cancel or downg: Will I lose credits if I cancel or downgrade?
No. Your unused credits stay available f: No. Your unused credits stay available for 3 months. But you'll only have access to the features included in your new (lower) plan.
How many credits do actions use?: How many credits do actions use?
We calculate usage at 1 credit per word. However, if AI model is used, the consumption of prompt tokens also needs to be included—each request requires approximately an additional 80 credits. If you would like to know the estimated cost of a translation task, please feel free to contact customer support.
Moving to the free plan will turn off ke: Moving to the free plan will turn off key features. Are you sure you want to switch?
The usage has exceeded your configured q: The usage has exceeded your configured quota. Please update your settings.
This language is not supported by Google: This language is not supported by Google Translate. Check the supported list in Google or switch to another model.
Your private API can run only one transl: Your private API can run only one translation at a time. Please wait until the current task is finished.
Select a private key for translation. On: Select a private key for translation. Only one target language can be selected.
Shared Plan: How to Set Up: Shared Plan: How to Set Up
The Shared Plan lets you extend your pur: The Shared Plan lets you extend your purchased plan to multiple stores, so each store can access the same benefits. This makes managing and collaborating across stores simple and seamless.
Points balance and IP quota are not incl: Points balance and IP quota are not included in sharing. Each store can purchase its own points if needed for features that require points or IP usage.
Find the store you want to bind and copy: Find the store you want to bind and copy its store URL.
Download and install the official app on: Download and install the official app on that store.
Share the store URL with our support tea: Share the store URL with our support team and request to bind a sub-account.
Activate your free trial to start transl: Activate your free trial to start translating instantly:
The current language does not support im: The current language does not support image translation
You have received {{ plan }} Plan benefi: You have received {{ plan }} Plan benefits
After AI evaluation, your website transl: After AI evaluation, your website translation quality score is
Please enable these permissions in your: Please enable these permissions in your settings.
To provide you with a better experience,: To provide you with a better experience, this app requires the following permissions:
You haven't added any languages yet.
Define key terms to keep translations co: Define key terms to keep translations consistent with your brand.
Enable automatic switching to match visi: Enable automatic switching to match visitors’ language and currency.
Make your translations live so customers: Make your translations live so customers can see them.
Turn on automatic translation to keep yo: Turn on automatic translation to keep your store updated in real time.
To track conversion rates across differe: To track conversion rates across different languages, this app requires:
You’ll be asked to Update permissions in: You’ll be asked to Update permissions in a later system prompt. Please confirm to unlock multilingual performance insights.
The source text is empty and cannot be t: The source text is empty and cannot be translated
This feature is available only with the: This feature is available only with the paid plan.
You’ve added all the terms allowed in yo: You’ve added all the terms allowed in your current plan.To keep building your glossary and improve translation accuracy, upgrade to a higher plan for more capacity.
Plan benefits: Translation credits never: Plan benefits: Translation credits never expire · monthly translation credits can be accumulated · translation credit transfer is supported.
Configure region-specific redirects for: Configure region-specific redirects for your visitors.Need more regions? Add them in your
Define the region, language, currency, a: Define the region, language, currency, and redirect URL for this rule.The Switcher will use these settings to direct visitors.
Due to Shopify Markets rules, each marke: Due to Shopify Markets rules, each market must use its default currency, so currencies cannot be customized.
Settings not applied. Please publish the: Settings not applied. Please publish the current language first.

v4.queueBusy: Translating one language; {{count}} more queued (init runs in parallel, translation is serial).

v4.error.glossaryNotFound: The glossary rule no longer exists.

v4.createTask.scopeBody: This will create {{tasks}} task(s): {{languages}} language(s) × {{modules}} content type(s).
v4.createTask.scopeFullBody: All {{languages}} languages and all {{modules}} content types are selected. This creates {{tasks}} bulk tasks. Review scope and credits before creating.

v4.createTask.estimateSelectFirst: Select languages and modules to estimate credits
v4.createTask.estimateFootnote: Estimate only — actual usage depends on translation tokens.
v4.tasks.title: Task list · {{count}}
v4.tasks.currentHelper: Active, paused, and failed tasks are shown here first.
v4.tasks.historyHelper: Completed and cancelled task records are kept here.
v4.tasks.noHistoryDesc: Completed or cancelled tasks will appear here.
v4.tasks.noCurrentDesc: Select target languages and content above, then create your first translation task.
v4.tasks.createdHint: {{count}} new task(s) were created below. Progress will keep updating here.
v4.tasks.deleteConfirmDesc: This removes the task record and its translation data. This cannot be undone.

onboarding.stepLocked: Please finish the previous step first
ready.title: {{language}} is ready
ready.subtitle: Auto-updates are on · Onboarding complete
ready.coverageHint: Your product starter pack is done. Pages, collections, and theme can still be filled in Smart Translate.
ready.nextModulesBody: {{language}} products are ready. Pages, collections, theme text, SEO, and other content can be translated next.
ready.nextLocaleBody: Apply this flow to more target languages and keep expanding the markets you can serve.
ready.nextAdvancedBody: Use glossary rules for brand terms, check the language switcher, and configure currencies when needed.
ready.nextGlossaryBody: Lock brand terms for more consistent translations.
ready.nextSwitcherBody: Let customers switch languages on your storefront.
ready.storeCoverageHint: {{percent}}% across all modules — you can fill the rest

trial.title: Trial translate a product
trial.description: Pick one product and one language. Preview the result first, then write it to Shopify when you confirm.
trial.welcome.eyebrow: Fastest path for a new store
trial.welcome.title: Start with 1 free product trial, then translate the full catalog
trial.welcome.subtitle: You do not need to publish the target language first. Ciwi creates a preview first; publish the language and enable the switcher later when you want to view the live storefront.
trial.welcome.actionHint: Pick a product and a language. The trial only creates a preview; it will not publish a language or change your store.
trial.welcome.trustFreeBody: Starting the trial does not use plan credits.
trial.welcome.trustSafeBody: It only creates a preview; no language is published and nothing is written to Shopify.
trial.welcome.trustFastBody: Quickly judge translation quality and page fit.
trial.welcome.outcomeTitle: A multilingual product catalog that keeps updating
trial.welcome.outcome1: Product titles, descriptions, options, and translations written to Shopify
trial.welcome.outcome2: Customers can switch languages on your storefront
trial.welcome.outcome3: New products are translated automatically later
trial.localeMissingHint: {{language}} is not in your store yet, but you can still trial it now. Add and publish the language later when you want to view the live product page.
trial.localeUnpublishedHint: {{language}} is enabled but not published. You can still trial it now and publish it later when you want to view the live product page.
trial.progressHint: Fetching and translating this product. Preview will appear when ready.
trial.resultHint: Compare the before and after first. Translations are written to Shopify only after you save.
trial.saveCardTitle: Save this product when it looks good
trial.saveHint: Only this product's {{language}} translation is saved. Your original product page stays unchanged, and you can undo it anytime in Shopify.
trial.savingHint: Writing translations to your store. This usually takes a few seconds.
trial.savedMessage: Saved. Your trial translation is now in Shopify.
trial.savedNextLine: Nice—that's how every product will look. Roll {{language}} out to your whole catalog next.
trial.switcherRequiredBody: Without the switcher, customers (and you) cannot see the translation on your live store. Turn on Ciwi Switcher in the theme editor and click Save.
trial.storefrontRequiredTitle: Publish the language and enable the switcher
trial.storefrontRequiredBody: Your trial is saved, but customers can only see {{language}} on the storefront after you publish the language and enable Ciwi Switcher in your theme.
trial.savedStorefrontTitle: To view the live product page, finish these two steps
trial.savedStorefrontHint: This is the part that affects whether customers can see the language on your storefront.
trial.savedPublishStepBody: After publishing, buyers can access this language on the storefront.
trial.savedSwitcherStepTitle: Enable Ciwi Switcher in your theme
trial.savedSwitcherStepBody: Without the switcher, shoppers and merchants have a hard time reaching the translated view.
trial.viewAfterSwitcherBody: Once the switcher is on, open the product page—we switch it to {{language}} automatically. This also counts as your storefront check.
trial.nextCatalogBody: Next, roll the same quality out to your full product catalog.
trial.nextCatalogPoint1: Translate all product titles, descriptions, options, and SEO
trial.nextCatalogPoint2: Create storefront product review entry points
trial.nextCatalogPoint3: Turn on auto-updates for new products after subscribing
trial.nextStepsIntro: Translations are saved to Shopify. Enable the switcher, check the live product, then translate more of your store.
trial.nextStep1Title: Enable the language switcher on your theme
trial.nextStep1Body: Open the theme editor, turn on Ciwi Switcher, and click Save. Customers can then switch languages on your store.
trial.nextStep1ImageAlt: Theme editor showing the Ciwi Switcher toggle
trial.nextStep1ImageCaption: Find Ciwi_Switcher in the theme editor and turn the switch on, then click Save.
trial.nextStep2Title: Check it on the product page!
trial.nextStep2Body: After the switcher is enabled, open this product. We'll switch to {{language}} automatically via the Ciwi switcher.
trial.nextStep3Body: If this product looks good, translate the rest of your catalog and turn on auto-updates for new products.
trial.nextOptionalTitle: Optional: preview on your storefront first
trial.nextOptionalBody: To check the live storefront first, enable the language switcher and open this product. The full-store flow will also guide these steps.
trial.switcherGuide: To see it in {{language}} on your real storefront, open the product page and switch languages with the Ciwi language switcher. If the switcher is not on your theme yet, enable it in Switcher settings.
trial.validation.sameAsSource: Target language cannot be the same as the source language.
trial.error.blockingTaskExists: A trial translation for this product and language is already running.
trial.error.productMissing: This trial task is missing a product.
trial.error.notReadyToSave: Translation is not ready to save yet.
trial.error.addLanguageFailed: Failed to add the language to your store.
expand.title: Expand Market
expand.description: Pick a language → translate all products → turn on auto-updates.
expand.fromTrialBanner: Continuing from your {{language}} trial. You can translate all products next.
expand.selectTargetHint: Pick a language above, then translate all products.
expand.starterHeroBody: Use this page to buy a small credit pack and create a product-module translation job for the same language. After it finishes, merchants understand the task flow before moving into subscription and auto-updates.
expand.starterOutcomeTitle: You get a product catalog ready to review
expand.starterOutcome1: All product titles, descriptions, options, and SEO are written to Shopify
expand.starterOutcome2: Open storefront product pages to check the real result
expand.starterOutcome3: Next, subscribe and enable auto-updates for new products
expand.step1Body: Add {{language}} to your store and publish it so the storefront can use it.
expand.step2Guide: Translate all products into {{language}} in one job. If the language is not published yet, we will publish it when you start.
expand.step2Progress: Translation is running. You can leave this page and come back later.
expand.step2Done: Product starter for {{language}} is done (all {{count}} products).
expand.step2EmptyComplete: The last job translated nothing (fields may already have translations or were filtered). Click translate again to overwrite these products.
expand.emptyCompleteHint: No fields were translated (0 items). Please start the starter pack again.
expand.needsPurchaseHint: A credit pack tops you up so you can translate these products. Credits never expire.
expand.needsPurchaseHintWithPack: Top up with the {{credits}} pack ({{currency}} {{price}}) to translate these products. Credits never expire.
expand.buyThenTranslateHint: After purchase, return here and start translating.
expand.translateCostHint: Clicking translate will use about {{credits}} credits from your balance.
expand.purchaseReturned: Purchase submitted. After Shopify confirms credits, click translate below.
expand.subscribeReturned: Subscription submitted. Next, turn on auto-updates for this language.
expand.nextSubscribeTitle: Subscribe, then auto-translate new products and content updates
expand.nextSubscribeBody: Current language: {{language}}. After subscribing, continue by turning on auto-updates so future products and edits are translated on schedule.
expand.nextSubscribePerk: Subscribe first, then tap Enable auto-updates for this language.
expand.nextAutoBody: You’re already subscribed. One click and we’ll regularly auto-translate new products and content updates for {{language}}.
expand.afterAutoHint: New products will be translated regularly. Preview the storefront first, then pick any path below when you’re ready.
expand.afterPreviewSwitcherNote: Make sure the Ciwi language switcher is enabled on your theme, otherwise translations won't show on the live store.
expand.afterPreviewBody: Open the storefront home in this language and check that customers can switch languages and content looks right. If switching fails, confirm the language switcher is added to your theme.
expand.afterAutoLiveCredits: New and edited products will be translated automatically · ~{{count}} products of credit left
expand.afterAutoLiveCreditsRaw: New and edited products will be translated automatically · ~{{credits}} credits left
expand.afterFullStoreTitle: Translate pages, collections, theme, and more
expand.afterFullStoreBody: Auto-updates cover future content. Existing pages / collections / theme can still be translated into {{language}} in one go. About {{credits}} credits (estimate only).
expand.afterPathLocaleBody: When {{language}} looks good, pick another language above and repeat publish + product bootstrap.
expand.afterPathAdvancedBody: Edit translations in detail, glossary, multi-currency, and plan credits when you need them.
expand.afterNextLanguageHint: Later: after this language feels solid, expand to another language.
expand.error.enableAutoFailed: Couldn’t enable auto-updates. Please try again.
expand.nextFullStoreBody: Also translate pages, collections, theme content, and more into {{language}}. Subscribers get pack discounts; then you can enable broader auto-updates.
expand.nextFullStoreAutoHint: Pairs with subscription for multi-module auto updates
expand.validation.sameAsSource: Target language cannot be the same as the source language.
expand.error.localeNotPublished: Publish the language before starting translation.
expand.error.blockingTaskExists: A translation for this language pair is already running.
expand.error.noProducts: No products found in this store.
expand.error.insufficientCredits: Not enough credits for the product starter. Buy a credit pack first.
expand.error.insufficientCreditsFullStor: Not enough credits for the full-store bootstrap. Buy a credit pack first.
